title: T-004 — lp_reservations table + partial-unique RM-root-only constraint (WH §5.4, §9.4)
prompt:
# T-004 — lp_reservations table + partial-unique RM-root-only constraint (WH §5.4, §9.4)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §5.4, §9.4
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create `lp_reservations` with RM-root-only scope per Q6 (revised C2 Sesja 2): intermediate cascade NEVER reserves (V-WH-FEFO-005). Enforce partial-unique `UNIQUE(lp_id) WHERE released_at IS NULL` so an LP cannot be hard-locked twice in parallel.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `0NN_lp_reservations.sql`: table per §5.4 with `lp_id`, `wo_id`, `wo_material_id`, `reserved_qty`, `reservation_type='hard_lock'` (P1 only), `reserved_at/by`, `released_at/by`, `release_reason` ENUM ('consumed','cancelled','wo_cancelled','admin_override').
2. Partial unique constraint: `CREATE UNIQUE INDEX lp_reservations_active ON lp_reservations(lp_id) WHERE released_at IS NULL`.
3. CHECK `reserved_qty > 0`.
4. RLS + tenant policy.
5. Drizzle schema + Insert/Select types.

## Files
- packages/db/src/schema/lp-reservations.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0NN_lp_reservations.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/lp-reservations.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given two transactions concurrently insert `lp_reservations` for the same LP with `released_at IS NULL`, when both commit, then exactly one succeeds and the other fails on the partial unique index (409 Conflict semantics).
2. Given a reservation row has `released_at` set, when a new reservation is inserted for the same LP, then it succeeds.
3. Given RLS is enabled, when tenant B reads reservations created by tenant A, then zero rows are returned.
4. Given `reservation_type='soft_plan'` is attempted, when inserted, then the CHECK or enum constraint rejects it (P1 hard_lock only).

## Test strategy
- RED: `packages/db/src/schema/lp-reservations.test.ts` asserting partial-unique concurrency + RLS + reservation_type CHECK.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test lp-reservations`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow `material_source='upstream_wo_output'` reservations (V-WH-FEFO-005 — service layer enforces; schema allows but tests must cover service guard).
- Do not use full UNIQUE(lp_id) — that would block release+re-reserve.
- Do not omit RLS.

## Dependencies
- T-002
